title: Levetiracetam
content_markdown:
##### Type

Antiepileptic

##### Presentations

500mg/5mL

##### Pharmacokinetics

IV/IO 
 Onset: Rapid 
 Max Effect: 30 – 120 minutes 
 Duration: 1 -2 days 

#### Uses

Status epilepticus:

- Refractory seizure activity 5/60 after second benzodiazepine dose.

- >20/60 seizure duration.

#### Adverse Effects

- Behavioural effects

- Drowsiness

- Weakness

- Dizziness and vertigo

- Headache

- Insomnia

- Amnesia

- Ataxia

- Diplopia

- Anorexia

#### Contraindications

- Known allergy.

#### Pregnancy and Breastfeeding

##### Pregnancy

- Safe to use

##### Breastfeeding

- Safe to use

#### Doses

- **ICP:** 40mg/kg (max. 3000mg) IV/IO, infused over 5/60 via infusion pump, no repeat. 

**Note:** If infusion pump unavailable, dose can be administered via slow IV/IO push over 5/60.
